pdg_node.statement: (initial_state: Vector[float] (x0), initial_covariance: Matrix[float] (P0), transition_matrix: Matrix[float] (F), process_noise: Matrix[float] (Q), observation_matrix: Matrix[float] (H), measurement_noise: Matrix[float] (R)) -> StateModelSpec{x, P, F, Q, H, R}
pdg_node.informal_desc: Create the immutable Kalman state-space model with latent mean and covariance plus fixed system/noise matrices.

declaration.name: initializelineargaussianstatemodel
declaration.type_signature: (initial_state: Vector[float] (x0), initial_covariance: Matrix[float] (P0), transition_matrix: Matrix[float] (F), process_noise: Matrix[float] (Q), observation_matrix: Matrix[float] (H), measurement_noise: Matrix[float] (R)) -> StateModelSpec{x, P, F, Q, H, R}
declaration.docstring: Create the immutable Kalman state-space model with latent mean and covariance plus fixed system/noise matrices.
declaration.conceptual_summary: Immutable Linear-Gaussian Dynamical System Specification. Binds an initial latent mean vector and covariance matrix with linear evolution and linear projection operators, plus additive noise covariances, into a single formal model specification. The operation does not propagate or update state; it only maps raw numerical tensors into an immutable typed object that encodes first-order Markov and Gaussian assumptions for later recursive estimation.. Applications: Multisensor robot pose tracking with uncertain motion and observation channels, Neural time-series latent trajectory decoding from noisy electrode measurements, Geophysical data assimilation for evolving spatial fields with partial observations, Industrial process digital twins for hidden system-state monitoring and anomaly detection

pdg_node.statement: (state_model: StateModelSpec{x, P, F, Q, H, R}) -> StateModelSpec{x_pred, P_pred, F, Q, H, R}
pdg_node.informal_desc: Apply the Kalman predict transition kernel to propagate latent mean/covariance forward in time.

declaration.name: predictlatentstate
declaration.type_signature: (state_model: StateModelSpec{x, P, F, Q, H, R}) -> StateModelSpec{x_pred, P_pred, F, Q, H, R}
declaration.docstring: Apply the Kalman predict transition kernel to propagate latent mean/covariance forward in time.
declaration.conceptual_summary: Linear-Gaussian State Moment Propagation. Maps a hidden state distribution one discrete step forward using a linear transition operator and additive noise. The mean is transformed as x_pred = F x, and the covariance is transformed as P_pred = F P F^T + Q, while non-updated model components are passed through unchanged. This is the prediction half of a recursive estimator that propagates first- and second-order moments under a first-order Markov assumption.. Applications: Forecasting hidden kinematic variables in autonomous motion estimation from noisy inertial streams., Propagating unobserved compartment intensities in stochastic population-dynamics monitoring between measurement times., Predicting internal thermofluid process states in industrial control loops before new sensor assimilation., Tracking latent neural population activity trajectories in brain-signal decoding pipelines.

declaration.name: predictlatentstate
declaration.type_signature: (state_model: StateModelSpec{x, P, F, Q, H, R}) -> StateModelSpec{x_pred, P_pred, F, Q, H, R}
declaration.docstring: Apply the Kalman predict transition kernel to propagate latent mean/covariance forward in time.

This is the prediction half of a recursive estimator that propagates first- and second-order moments under a first-order Markov assumption.. Applications: Forecasting hidden kinematic variables in autonomous motion estimation from noisy inertial streams., Propagating unobserved compartment intensities in stochastic population-dynamics monitoring between measurement times., Predicting internal thermofluid process states in industrial control loops before new sensor assimilation., Tracking latent neural population activity trajectories in brain-signal decoding pipelines.

pdg_node.statement: (predicted_state_model: StateModelSpec{x_pred, P_pred, F, Q, H, R}, measurement: Vector[float] (z)) -> StateModelSpec{x_post, P_post, F, Q, H, R}
pdg_node.informal_desc: Apply the Kalman update kernel to incorporate a measurement and produce posterior latent mean/covariance.

declaration.name: updatewithmeasurement
declaration.type_signature: (predicted_state_model: StateModelSpec{x_pred, P_pred, F, Q, H, R}, measurement: Vector[float] (z)) -> StateModelSpec{x_post, P_post, F, Q, H, R}
declaration.docstring: Apply the Kalman update kernel to incorporate a measurement and produce posterior latent mean/covariance.
declaration.conceptual_summary: Linear-Gaussian Belief Conditioning Step. Combines a predicted multivariate Gaussian latent estimate with a new observation vector through a linear observation operator and additive Gaussian noise model. It computes an innovation term, weights that innovation by uncertainty-aware gain, and produces an analytically updated latent mean and covariance. The result is a posterior estimate that balances prior dynamics with new evidence in minimum-variance closed form under linear-Gaussian assumptions.. Applications: Assimilating sparse remote-sensing observations into geophysical field-state estimates in environmental simulation., Updating latent neural population dynamics from partial electrode readouts in computational neuroscience., Correcting internal electrochemical state estimates from voltage/current observations in energy-storage management., Conditioning compartmental latent dynamics using delayed incidence observations in epidemiological inference.

declaration.name: updatewithmeasurement
declaration.type_signature: (predicted_state_model: StateModelSpec{x_pred, P_pred, F, Q, H, R}, measurement: Vector[float] (z)) -> StateModelSpec{x_post, P_post, F, Q, H, R}
declaration.docstring: Apply the Kalman update kernel to incorporate a measurement and produce posterior latent mean/covariance.

pdg_node.statement: (current_state_model: StateModelSpec{x, P, F, Q, H, R}) -> Vector[float] (x)
pdg_node.informal_desc: Read out the current latent state mean estimate from immutable filter state.

declaration.name: exposelatentmean
declaration.type_signature: (current_state_model: StateModelSpec{x, P, F, Q, H, R}) -> Vector[float] (x)
declaration.docstring: Read out the current latent state mean estimate from immutable filter state.
declaration.conceptual_summary: Latent State Mean Projection. Extracts the central tendency vector from a composite latent-state specification without modifying any component of that specification. The operation is a direct structural projection from a state tuple to its mean element, preserving dimensionality and numeric values exactly.. Applications: Mobile autonomy: expose the current pose/velocity latent estimate from a probabilistic motion-state container for downstream planning., Neuroscience signal inference: read the inferred hidden neural activity mean from a state-space estimator at each timestep., Atmospheric or oceanic data assimilation: retrieve the current analyzed latent field mean from a sequential estimator state., Industrial process monitoring: extract current hidden process-condition mean from a dynamical estimator for control logic.

declaration.name: exposelatentmean

pdg_node.statement: (current_state_model: StateModelSpec{x, P, F, Q, H, R}) -> Matrix[float] (P)
pdg_node.informal_desc: Read out the current latent covariance estimate from immutable filter state.

declaration.name: exposecovariance
declaration.type_signature: (current_state_model: StateModelSpec{x, P, F, Q, H, R}) -> Matrix[float] (P)
declaration.docstring: Read out the current latent covariance estimate from immutable filter state.
declaration.conceptual_summary: Latent Uncertainty Matrix Projection. Selects and returns the second-order uncertainty component from an immutable estimator-state tuple without altering any state variables. The operation is an identity-level projection from a composite structured object to its covariance substructure, preserving matrix values and topology. The result is the current symmetric positive semi-definite pairwise uncertainty representation over latent dimensions.. Applications: Robot localization pipelines extracting current pose-uncertainty structure for motion-planning risk bounds, Atmospheric data assimilation systems exposing uncertainty coupling between latent grid variables, Neural signal decoding frameworks retrieving latent-state uncertainty for adaptive stimulation control, Manufacturing process monitoring engines reading uncertainty matrices to trigger tolerance-aware interventions
